title: Knowledge
description: Manage knowledge bases and documents for your agents.

empty.title: No knowledge bases found
empty.description: Create your first knowledge base to get started.
empty.noResults: No knowledge bases match your search.

permissionDenied.read: You do not have permission to view knowledge.
permissionDenied.create: You do not have permission to create knowledge bases.
permissionDenied.update: You do not have permission to edit knowledge bases.
permissionDenied.delete: You do not have permission to delete knowledge bases.

delete.title: Delete knowledge base
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

description.create: Fill in the details for the new knowledge base.

placeholders.name: e.g. Sales FAQ
placeholders.description: Describe the purpose of this knowledge base
placeholders.content: Paste or write the manual knowledge base content here

hints.content: You can also complement or replace this content with uploaded documents.

validation.nameRequired: Please enter a knowledge base name.
validation.nameMinLength: The name must be at least 2 characters long.

dropzone.hint: Drag a file here or choose one from your computer.

error.fileTooLarge: The file exceeds the 10 MB limit.
